meaning: Arithmetic Logic Unit,算术逻辑单元
examples: Comparison is one of the main activities of the ALU.
The ALU is one component of the CPU (central processing unit).
Upon inquiry, the Alu settle down a friend who is a pregnant woman.
Investors in Alcatel-Lucent ( NYSE: ALU) saw new options become available today, for the July expiration.
He sees only modest potential returns for ALU investors given the recent run in the stock.
